name_en: OHANEL New Denim CF 25C Hidden Style🙈Absolutely stunning at first glance. I just love this simple style, which is more versatile and timeless💖The special feature is that while most shoulder straps use light blue leather chains, this one features a black leather chain strap, making it more premium and retro. A trendy item!Size Small 20cm
